claimBoundary: evidence navigation index only; not product, clinical, Quest, scoring, or production readiness evidence
usageRule: Use this index to find representative evidence quickly; use the generated artifact registry for deletion/ignore/commit decisions.

laneSummaries.title: Full application smoke evidence
laneSummaries.description: Representative app-level smoke/resmoke artifacts for UI-admin and UI-XR behavior.

laneSummaries.title: UI-XR visual and realism evidence
laneSummaries.description: Recent screenshots and JSON evidence for encounter visual realism, actor cues, and WebXR-only cleanup.

laneSummaries.title: Encounter factory manifests and runtime packets
laneSummaries.description: Factory operation manifests, handoff preflight, launch selection, publication payload, runtime bundle, and environment/equipment artifacts.

laneSummaries.title: Humanoid and garment pipeline evidence
laneSummaries.description: Garment allowlist, fit, provider gate, humanoid source, body measurement, and Blender refinement artifacts.

laneSummaries.title: Quest and WebXR evidence
laneSummaries.description: Retained Quest/WebXR evidence templates and current checks; stale early Quest evidence is pruned separately by artifact registry policy.

laneSummaries.title: Provider and asset gate evidence
laneSummaries.description: Local provider, asset generation, asset readiness, production ladder, GLTF, and Blender bake evidence.
